test:frontend.error: Frontend tests fail with vi.mock() hoisting issues in dashboard.test.tsx and onboarding.test.tsx. These are test infrastructure bugs, not implementation bugs. auth.test.ts passes. (Same as prior synthesis.)

test:backend.error: 121 tests passed, 7 errors in test_admin_users.py due to fixture issue (no such table: users). This is a test fixture issue, not implementation bug. (Same as prior synthesis.)

lint:frontend.error: Warnings present (next/next/no-img-element, @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars, react-hooks/exhaustive-deps) - same as prior synthesis

blockingIssues.description: Pagination count bug: get_question_count() called without year filter in loop at router.py:129, causing all years to show identical counts.
Practice/exam modes: URL id parameter (pyqId) extracted but never passed to fetchPYQs(). API fetches all filtered PYQs regardless of specific question selected.
Hardcoded mock subjects (MOCK_SUBJECTS) and topics with hardcoded IDs instead of API calls. Bookmarks stored in local React state only, not persisted.

N+1 query problem: 4 repository methods (get_subject_stats_for_attempts:97, get_topic_stats_for_attempts:143, get_weak_questions_for_topic:187, get_time_stats_by_subject:273) use nested loops with individual DB queries.
Date filtering bug: _calculate_subject_accuracy trend calculation ignores user's date filter when start_date is None, causing incorrect trend results.
Division by zero bug was FIXED in this round - _calculate_mock_comparison now checks if total_questions > 0 before dividing.
_update_streak() modifies streak_freezes_available, streak_freezes_used, and current_streak in memory but never calls update_streak_record() to persist. Changes are lost.
_generate_daily_tasks() creates duplicate tasks: weak_topics iterated twice (152-157 for revision, 163-167 for lesson), causing same topics scheduled for both revision AND lesson on same day.

Backend endpoints completely missing. Frontend calls /admin/subjects, /admin/topics, /admin/lessons, /admin/questions, /admin/test-series, /admin/upload but these are NOT implemented in router.py. Zero changes made to backend since original commit.

appliedUpdates.description: test:backend command documented to require DATABASE_URL environment variable set to 'sqlite+aiosqlite:///:memory:' for test runs (noted in prior synthesis)

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add enforcement for max file size (200-300 lines) specified in Clean Code section. Multiple content milestone files exceed this guideline significantly.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: pyq-library has files with 400-600+ lines vs 200-300 line guideline

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify TDD requirement - features should create unit tests for new functionality. Workers should verify test files exist before marking feature complete.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: pyq-library, admin-content-management have no tests for their functionality despite skill requiring TDD

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add N+1 query prevention to code review checklist. Repository methods must use JOINs or selectinload for batch fetching, not nested loops with individual queries.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: performance-analytics has N+1 issues in 4 methods causing 500+ queries per analytics call

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add missing implementation detection - workers must verify all API endpoints called by frontend exist in router.py before marking feature complete.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: admin-content-management frontend calls 6 backend endpoints that don't exist
